name: Lunch Money Add-on
description: Synchronise your Lunch Money cash balances to Wealthfolio
author: stephen.elson@gmail.com

permissions.purpose: Display and link Lunch Money accounts to Wealthfolio accounts
Sync Lunch Money account balances as point-in-time snapshots
Store Lunch Money API key securely
Fetch current Wealthfolio cash balances to compare against Lunch Money
Navigate to Wealthfolio account detail pages
Log errors to the Wealthfolio logger
Add navigation items and routes to the sidebar, and clean up on disable
